title: WorldEdit Colored Tools
description: This mod adds 90+1 new dummy item, ready to be used as WorldEdit brushes
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/fiK9O1m.png)

So one day a friend of mine came to me with an idea of making many items that by themselves do nothing. He is a builder and uses WorldEdit brushes a lot, so he wanted these items to be able to assign brushes to them. Due to their different textures, they can be easily distinguishable.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FXHkJAKx/images/ee5fb314925664222ef360c683bd18b08a9142fd.png)

P.S. While these items look like tools, they're only made to be used as brushes, so they can't be crafted and don't work like their vanilla alternatives. They are non-stackable and can't be damaged.

Uhm, I should tell a little bit more about these items, shouldn't I?

Okay.

**This mod adds these UNIQUE items:**

# More wooden pickaxes!!!
## Gray Wooden Pickaxe
This item does nothing
